steps.title: Show the rural-life link
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how the calendar honored rural life. The relevant note says each day was named after a plant, animal, agricultural tool, or mineral as a way of honoring rural life, with Oie, meaning goose, as an example.

steps.title: Reject structure-only details
steps.content: Choice B describes the calendar's month and week structure. Choice C focuses on unique names without the rural-life purpose. Choice D also focuses only on unique names in Brumaire. The remaining choice states the honoring purpose and gives the goose example. The answer is A.
